entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCES
entities.description: Fundamental elements for the structure and function of agricultural systems and sustainability

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems of farming and food production that depend on natural resources

entities.name: SOCIAL AND ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The state of supporting life on earth through balanced agricultural and natural resource management

entities.name: GLOBAL AGRICULTURAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The historical process of improving agricultural output and systems worldwide

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output, historically a primary focus of development

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of managing natural resources to ensure food and nutritional security

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to sufficient, affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: SYSTEMS-ORIENTED APPROACH
entities.description: A holistic approach used to address complex challenges in production systems across different ecologies

entities.name: FARMING SYSTEMS SUSTAINABILITY AND RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of farming systems to maintain productivity and recover from disturbances

entities.name: FSSR FRAMEWORK
entities.description: A multidimensional quantification framework for assessing farming systems sustainability and resilience

entities.name: FARM HOUSEHOLDS
entities.description: The smallest unit of analysis for measuring sustainability and resilience

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL DOMAIN
entities.description: One of the five major domains of the FSSR framework focusing on ecological health

entities.name: ECONOMIC DOMAIN
entities.description: One of the five major domains of the FSSR framework focusing on financial viability

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY DOMAIN
entities.description: One of the five major domains of the FSSR framework focusing on output levels

entities.name: SOCIAL DOMAIN
entities.description: One of the five major domains of the FSSR framework focusing on societal factors

entities.name: HUMAN WELL-BEING DOMAIN
entities.description: One of the five major domains of the FSSR framework focusing on the quality of life of farmers

entities.name: INDICATORS
entities.description: Measurable elements used to provide an index value for sustainability

entities.name: STAKEHOLDERS' CONSULTATIONS
entities.description: The process of involving farmers, researchers, and experts to finalize framework indicators
